t: [A text belonging to the Instructor. The son]g accompanying the sacrifice on the sixth Sabbath, sung on the ninth of the [second] month.
[Bless the Go]d of the godlike beings, you who inhabit the highest heaven
[…] Holy of Holies, and exalt His glory
[…] knowledge of the eternal godlike beings.
[…] those called to the highest of heights […]
